name: tool_group_scene_api
description: Execute one high-level group/scene operation. Handler and backend perform all prechecks and details.

controller_address.description: **Mandatory** for all operations. Can be the scene address.

is_controller.description: Only for group_scene_add_member. Defaults to false when omitted.

name.description: Optional name for renaming a link when adding to a group/scene

link.description: Only for group_scene_update_link. Link settings object; handler injects link_address as link.node.
